title: Blackspur - 8pc Cabinet Handle Screwdriver Set - Multicolour
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: This screwdriver set contains all the popular sizes as follows:- 5 Slotted Screwdrivers: 6mm x 2mm, 5mm x 75mm, 5mm x 1mm x 6mm x 15mm, 6mm x 38mm; 3 Crosspoint Screwdrivers: No2 x 1mm, No1 x 75mm, No2 x 38mm
With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
description: Blackspur screwdriver set includes 3x cross point and 5x slotted tips screwdrivers. Heat treated carbon steel blades. Hardened tips. Cabinet handles. Packed in slide blister. Slotted tips include sizes: 6 x 38mm, 5 x 75mm, 5 x 100mm, 6 x 150mm and 8 x 200mm. Cross point tips include sizes: 2 x 38mm, 1 x 75mm and 1 x 100mm. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK.
